price: Wir haben ihn ja den (rechten) Weg geleitet, ob er nun dankbar oder undankbar sein mag.
arabic: إِنَّا هَدَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرٗا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: innā hadaynāhu al-sabīla immā shākiran wa-immā kafūran
